'''''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Flashpoint''''' is the second story arc of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] series of comics. It consists of issues 7, 8 and 10.

==Plot summary==
[[The Last Resort (starship)|''The Last Resort'']], in search of supplies, lands on the planet [[Vanquo]], where the crew tricks the nearby miner camp into believing that the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] are landing. However, once the camp is abandoned, the Mandalorians do attack Vanquo, kidnapping [[Jarael]], who was disguised as [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Q'Anilia]]. During Jarael's capture, Mandalorian Commander [[Rohlan Dyre]] tries to steal ''The Last Resort'',<ref name="KOTOR 7" /> but is instead captured by [[Zayne Carrick]], Gryph and Camper. As the Mandalorians engage in a [[Battle of Vanquo|space battle]] with Captain [[Saul Karath]], the detained Rohlan agrees to guide ''The Last Resort'' to [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station|Flashpoint Station]], where Mandalorian scientist [[Demagol]] is experimenting on Jedi, including Squint, and where Jarael (mistaken for a Jedi) was taken.<ref name="k8">[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]]</ref>

With Rohlan's help, Zayne infiltrates Flashpoint and disguises himself as scientist Demagol. Together with Gryph, disguised as a Republic admiral, he tricks the Mandalorians into believing that the Republic is attacking and that the captured Republic starships are rigged with explosives. This forces the Mandalorians to evacuate quickly, leaving the Republic vessels behind. Squint, Jarael, and the other captured Jedi head for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with Demagol in tow, as he had been captured. Rohlan, unknown to everyone, boards ''The Last Resort'' as a stowaway.<ref name="k10">[[Knights of the Old Republic 10|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 10]]</ref>
